hypothesis: floor-trader pivot FIRST-TOUCH reversal: bounce off S1/S2 -> CALL, rejection at R1/R2 -> PUT; CPR width as regime tag (narrow vs wide)

sourced_rules.pivot_formula: P=(H+L+C)/3; S1=2P-H; R1=2P-L; S2=P-(H-L); R2=P+(H-L) (prior RTH HLC)
sourced_rules.entry: first-touch tag of S1/S2 (CALL) or R1/R2 (PUT) + rejection candle (wick-dominant, close back across level)
sourced_rules.confirmation: hammer/inverted-hammer rejection at level; first touch most reliable (edgeful)
sourced_rules.invalidation: next pivot beyond the level (deeper support for CALL / higher resistance for PUT) = chart-stop
sourced_rules.cpr: BC=(H+L)/2; TC=(P-BC)+P; narrow CPR (<20% prior range) precedes trend (Zerodha) — regime tag only, no fabricated breakout rule
sourced_rules.touch_stat_context: edgeful YM: open in PP-S1 -> PP touched 85.2%; open in PP-R1 -> R1 54%, R2 27.4% (futures, NOT an SPY option edge — C4/L58)

verdict: NOT A CANDIDATE — fails: positive_quarters=3/6 (need >=4); top5_day_pct=423.0% (need <200); drop_top5_per_trade=-5.9 (need >0)

DISCLOSURE.authority: real OPRA fills (C1) — the WR/expectancy authority
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: edgeful touch stats are YM futures cross-sectional — NOT a SPY 0DTE option edge (C4/L58); the real-fills sweep is the actual test
DISCLOSURE.no_cherry_pick: best cell chosen by total P&L among n>=20 cells; if it fails any gate, clears_bar=false (no thin-N / high-concentration / OOS-negative cherry-pick)
